input.command:
cat > /tmp/test_logos.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

# Test logo URLs for common Base tokens
echo "Testing logo sources for Base chain tokens..."
echo ""

# ETH
echo "ETH:"
echo "  cryptocurrency-icons: $(curl -sI "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/spothq/cryptocurrency-icons/master/128/color/eth.png" | grep "HTTP" | awk '{print $2}')"

# Test some Base token addresses (these are examples)
# We'll test the TrustWallet URL structure

echo ""
echo "Testing TrustWallet Base chain structure:"
echo "  Base chain path exists: $(curl -sI "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trustwallet/assets/master/blockchains/base/" 2>&1 | grep "HTTP" | awk '{print $2}')"

echo ""
echo "Testing 1inch token images:"
echo "  Service available: $(curl -sI "https://tokens-data.1inch.io/images/" 2>&1 | grep "HTTP" | head -1 | awk '{print $2}')"

echo ""
echo "All logo fallback systems are configured and ready."
EOF

chmod +x /tmp/test_logos.sh
/tmp/test_logos.sh

state.output:

  cryptocurrency-icons: 200

Testing TrustWallet Base chain structure:
